objectives: Define core concepts in data science
Apply basic statistics to summarize and interpret data
learning_path.title: Foundations of data science and statistics

objectives: Use Python to load, inspect, and manipulate data
Write clear, reusable Python code for analysis tasks
learning_path.title: Python essentials for data workflows

objectives: Perform vectorized computations for efficiency
Use arrays to represent and transform datasets
learning_path.title: Numerical computing with Numpy

objectives: Use Pandas to clean, join, and reshape tabular data
Create reliable data summaries for downstream analysis
learning_path.title: Data manipulation with Pandas

objectives: Query datasets using Sql to filter, aggregate, and join
Extract analysis-ready datasets for Python workflows
learning_path.title: Sql for data access and analysis

objectives: Identify common data quality issues and apply fixes
Prepare consistent datasets for modeling and analysis
learning_path.title: Data Cleaning And Preprocessing end-to-end

objectives: Create effective plots to understand distributions and relationships
Communicate insights using clear visual encodings
learning_path.title: Exploratory data visualization

objectives: Apply data mining approaches to find structure in data
Translate discovered patterns into actionable analysis questions
learning_path.title: Data mining for pattern discovery

objectives: Explain core Machine Learning problem types and workflows
Set up a basic modeling pipeline from data to predictions
learning_path.title: Machine Learning fundamentals

objectives: Train baseline models using Scikit-Learn
Use consistent workflows for fitting and predicting
learning_path.title: Scikit-Learn modeling workflows

objectives: Create and transform features to improve model performance
Assess feature impact through iterative experimentation
learning_path.title: Feature Engineering for improved models

objectives: Select appropriate evaluation approaches for different modeling goals
Validate models to reduce overfitting and improve reliability
learning_path.title: Model Evaluation And Validation

objectives: Design data flows that support repeatable analysis and modeling
Integrate Sql extraction with Python-based preparation steps
learning_path.title: Data engineering for ML-ready pipelines

objectives: Execute an end-to-end workflow from data access to validated model results
Present findings using data visualization and clear evaluation evidence
learning_path.title: Capstone: end-to-end data science project

matched_occupation.description: Data scientists find and interpret rich data sources, manage large amounts of data, merge data sources, ensure consistency of data-sets, and create visualisations to aid in understanding data. They build mathematical models using data, present and communicate data insights and findings to specialists and scientists in their team and if required, to a non-expert audience, and recommend ways to apply the data.
matched_occupation.label: data scientist
